summary: Apple is set for a leadership change as Tim Cook steps down in September, with John Ternus taking over. From its founding by Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak to today, here’s a look at the CEOs who have shaped the company’s growth and influence over 50 years.

title: Sundar Pichai congratulates Tim Cook on stepping down as Apple CEO: ‘Incredible run’
summary: Tim Cook is stepping down as Apple's CEO, transitioning to executive chairman. John Ternus will succeed him on 1 September, overseeing hardware engineering.&nbsp;

summary: According to Layoffs.fyi, 81,272 tech employees have been laid off so far in 2026.

summary: India’s smartphone market is hitting a premiumization ceiling as upgrade cycles stretch to nearly 48 months, driven by higher prices, durable devices and longer software support.

title: Microsoft must face $2.8 billion UK lawsuit over cloud computing licences
summary: A London tribunal has allowed a mass lawsuit against Microsoft. Thousands of British businesses claim they were overcharged for Windows Server software.
